candidates.why: Explicit D&A disclosure tied to cost of revenues, but it appears to be a component within the already selected parent row 'Cost of Operating Revenue' rather than a separate operating expense to add. The operating expense totals also foot without adding it separately, which indicates it is already embedded and adding it would double count.

variables.notes: Selected COGS parent bucket is 'Cost of Operating Revenue'. 'Depreciation in Cost of Revenues' looks like a disclosed sub-component of that bucket, not an extra same-level line to add separately.

candidates.why: This row belongs to cost of revenues, not SG&A. No SG&A-specific depreciation/amortisation row is visible in the operating section excerpt.
